---
title: "Tcellex_Validation4"
author: "Ashita Jawali"
date: "2026-04-24"
output: html_document
---


```{r cars}
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

seurat_obj <- readRDS("C:/Users/ashit/Desktop/Research Paper/Tcellex/Validation/final_seurat.rds")

cat("Calculating abundance...\n")

abundance <- seurat_obj@meta.data %>%
  group_by(histology, `Major.cell.type`) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = `Major.cell.type`, values_from = count, values_fill = 0)

# ✅ FIX: ROW-WISE normalization (same as Python)
abundance_pct <- abundance %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(across(-histology, ~ .x / sum(c_across(-histology)) * 100)) %>%
  ungroup()

# Robust T-cell detection
tcell_col <- grep("T.?cell|Lymph", colnames(abundance_pct), ignore.case = TRUE, value = TRUE)[1]

proof_data <- abundance_pct %>%
  select(histology, all_of(tcell_col)) %>%
  rename(T_Cell_Percentage = !!tcell_col)

print(proof_data)

ggplot(proof_data, aes(x = histology, y = T_Cell_Percentage, fill = histology)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", T_Cell_Percentage)), vjust = -0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("LUAD"="#1f77b4", "LUSC"="#ff7f0e")) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave("Tcell_abundance.png", width = 6, height = 5)

cat("SUCCESS\n")
```
